translations.en: the druidess Jaana.
translations.zh: 德魯伊祭司雅娜。

translations.en: "I fear I know little that would help in this situation, $G."
translations.zh: 「吾恐怕所知甚少，難以在此情況下助汝，$G。」

translations.en: "Good $T, $G. Hast thou need of my services again?"
translations.zh: 「$G，$T好。汝是否再次需要吾的幫助？」

translations.en: "Ask me to @join and I will, gladly, $G!"
translations.zh: 「請汝邀吾@join（入伙），吾會欣然答應，$G！」

translations.en: "Very well. Thou needst but ask..."
translations.zh: 「很好。汝只需開口便是……」

translations.en: "Good $T, $G! Hast thou fared well in thy travels?"
translations.zh: 「$G，$T好！汝旅途一切安好嗎？」

translations.en: "Joyous news! Thou must tell me of it sometime."
translations.zh: 「喜訊！汝改天一定要告訴吾詳情。」

translations.en: "Mayhap I could help. Ask me to @join thy band, $G, and gladly I will!"
translations.zh: 「或許吾能出些力。邀吾@join（入伙）汝的隊伍，$G，吾會欣然答應！」

translations.en: "$P! 'Tis a great joy and relief to see thou hast returned to Britannia, $G!"
translations.zh: 「$P！見汝回到不列顛尼亞，吾既欣喜又寬慰，$G！」

translations.en: She greets your other traveling companions.
translations.zh: 她向汝其他的同行夥伴問好。

translations.en: Everyone seems pleased to be reunited, albeit under tense circumstances.
translations.zh: 眾人重逢皆感欣慰，儘管情勢緊張。

translations.en: "Mayhap I can help thee in thy struggle against the @gargoyles."
translations.zh: 「或許吾能在汝對抗@gargoyles（魔像族）的征途中助一臂之力。」

translations.en: "Thou needst but ask and I will gladly @join, $G."
translations.zh: 「汝只需開口，吾便欣然@join（入伙），$G。」

translations.en: "Why, my name's Jaana, $G."
translations.zh: 「哎，吾叫雅娜，$G。」

translations.en: "Surely my help in thy previous quests was not so insignificant that thou hast forgotten it!"
translations.zh: 「吾在汝往昔任務中的貢獻，想必還不至於微不足道到讓汝遺忘吧！」

translations.en: "Since thy last visit to Britannia, I have lived in Yew, blessing crops and tending to sick animals."
translations.zh: 「自汝上次離開不列顛尼亞，吾便一直住在尤城，為農作物祈福、照料生病的動物。」

translations.en: "Though I know 'tis unbecoming of a simple druid to do so, I miss the excitement of our quests together!"
translations.zh: 「雖然吾知道這樣想對一個普通德魯伊來說有失體統，但吾實在懷念吾等共同冒險的刺激！」

translations.en: "I would gladly @join thee, $G, if thou had a use for my skills."
translations.zh: 「若汝用得上吾的技藝，吾欣然@join（入伙）汝，$G。」

translations.en: "Surely I misunderstand thee, $G."
translations.zh: 「吾想吾誤解汝的意思了，$G。」

translations.en: "Am I not already a member of thy band?"
translations.zh: 「吾難道還不是汝隊伍的一員嗎？」

translations.en: "Gladly, $G!"
translations.zh: 「欣然從命，$G！」

translations.en: "Nay, $G, thou seemst to have enough companions as it is."
translations.zh: 「不，$G，汝的同伴似乎已經夠多了。」

translations.en: "Mayhap if one of them left your band, thou might have more need of me."
translations.zh: 「或許若其中一人離開，汝就會更需要吾了。」

translations.en: "Let us discuss such matters ashore."
translations.zh: 「此等事宜，讓吾等上岸再談吧。」

translations.en: "I can barely think out here a'sea!"
translations.zh: 「吾在海上根本無法思考！」

translations.en: For the first time, you notice that Jaana seems definitely seasick!
translations.zh: 這時汝才注意到，雅娜顯然暈船了！

translations.en: "Whatever thou thinkest best, $G."
translations.zh: 「汝覺得怎樣好就怎樣，$G。」

translations.en: "Thou mayst keep my supplies."
translations.zh: 「汝可以留下吾的補給品。」

translations.en: "Perhaps I misunderstand, $G."
translations.zh: 「或許吾誤解了，$G。」

translations.en: "I cannot leave thy party since I am not in it!"
translations.zh: 「吾既未在汝的隊伍中，又何談離開！」

translations.en: "Let us discuss such matters ashore."
translations.zh: 「此等事宜，讓吾等上岸再談吧。」

translations.en: "I can barely think out here a'sea!"
translations.zh: 「吾在海上根本無法思考！」

translations.en: For the first time, you notice that Jaana seems definitely seasick!
translations.zh: 這時汝才注意到，雅娜顯然暈船了！

translations.en: "I know little of the gargoyles, $G, save what rumors I hear."
translations.zh: 「吾對魔像族所知甚少，$G，只聽過一些傳言。」

translations.en: "But I know that the gargoyles are fierce fighters, and a great threat to the land!"
translations.zh: 「但吾知道魔像族是兇猛的戰士，對這片土地是一大威脅！」

translations.en: "I've heard that Nicodemus the enchanter lives between two rivers."
translations.zh: 「吾聽說術士尼科德慕斯住在兩條河流之間。」

translations.en: "May the virtues guide us in our quest!"
translations.zh: 「願美德引領吾等完成任務！」

translations.en: "Farewell! Return when thou hast more news of thy quest!"
translations.zh: 「珍重！待汝有任務的新消息時再來吧！」

translations.en: "Alas, I know nothing of $Z, $G."
translations.zh: 「唉，吾對『$Z』一無所知，$G。」

translations.en: "Beg pardon?"
translations.zh: 「請問汝說什麼？」

translator_notes: 雅娜是玩家的老同伴，德魯伊祭司，現住尤城。用「吾」自稱，語氣溫柔而積極，渴望再次冒險。她有暈船的弱點，在海上時頻繁提起。
